title: Mesh Bucket
description: A quilt based kitchen sink pack minus the tech
body:
Mesh bucket is a kitchen sink modpack designed around the idea of never having electricity or power. The primary mods are Botania and Create with a ton of vanilla-like mods to add a new level of creativity and design options in your builds. 


<details><summary>Included Mods</summary>

## Content Mods
- Aurora's Deco
- Adorn
- Botania
- Additional Additions
- Building Wands
- Chalk
- CC:Tweaked
- Create (Sodium Fix)
- Do a Barrel Roll
- Dark utils
- Expanded Storage
- Extended Drawers
- Extra Alchemy
- Fabric Waystones
- Farmers Delight
- Icarus
- Inmus (+ 3d addon)
- Item Collectors
- Lootr
- Might Mail
- Natures Compass
- Plant in a jar
- Simple Cobble Gen
- Tempad 
- Tiny Coal
- Trinkets
- Vein Mining 
- Winterly
- XP storage
- You're In Grave Danger

## Visual mods
- Blur
- 3d skin layers
- Appleskin
- Clean F3
- Continuity 
- Dark Loading Screen
- Ears+
- Fadeless 
- Faithful 32x and Applepeel
- Falling Leaves
- LambDynamicLights & Better Grass
- Make Bubble pop
- Not enough anim
- Ok zoomer
- Seamless 
- Smooth Scrolling
- Visuality
- Xaero Minimap & world map

- Clumps
- Cull less leaves
- Double Doors (Server Side)
- Dynamic FPS
- EMI (+ Addons)
- Enchant Descriptions 
- Inspectio
- Enhanced Block Entities
- Entity Culling
- Falling Tree (Server Side)
- Fast Anim 
- Faster Random
- Ferrite
- Global Datapacks
- Indium 
- Krypton
- Lazy DFU
- Let me Despawn 
- Lithium

</details>
